message:
fix(agents): fix CRLF parsing bug and add missing test coverage

Fix closing delimiter search to use the correct line-ending style
detected from the opening delimiter, preventing \n from matching
inside \r\n sequences. Fix body extraction to use delimiter length
instead of scanning for \n. Add tests for CRLF parsing, capabilities
field, and DEFAULT_CONSTRAINTS merge behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
